evidence.scientific_clarity: Force-directed spring layout clearly separates 4 communities; 30 nodes with numeric labels, reduced-alpha edges prevent hairball; scientific claim (community structure) is immediately legible.
evidence.typography: Script does not set pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=0; PDF analysis confirmed Type3 (bitmapped) fonts; likely default DejaVu Sans throughout.
evidence.palette: Uses Wong colorblind-safe palette (#E69F00, #56B4E9, #009E73, #CC79A7); purely categorical usage with no red/green directional confusion.
evidence.layout_density: 6x6 figure with k=1.8 spring layout and node_size=220 gives well-spaced nodes; no label overlaps observed; edges at alpha=0.25 prevent visual clutter.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption accurately describes figure content, colors, and method; legend placed lower-right away from dense graph region; specific finding ('ring-like backbone with cross-community bridges') noted.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF confirmed to contain Type3 fonts (non-selectable/non-editable); gen_figure.py has no rcParams setting for pdf.fonttype=42 anywhere.
evidence.file_format: All four required outputs present and non-trivial: figure.pdf, figure.png, caption.tex, gen_figure.py; bonus figure.svg also generated.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states specific edge count (68), describes visual encoding (colors, opacity), and identifies a structural finding (ring-like backbone, cross-community bridges).

overall_strengths: Colorblind-safe Wong palette applied correctly for categorical community labels with clear visual separation.
Caption includes specific numerical claim (68 edges) and a structural finding, matching the figure accurately.
overall_weaknesses: PDF and SVG fonts are Type3 (bitmapped) due to missing pdf.fonttype=42 / svg.fonttype=0 settings in gen_figure.py.
Default DejaVu Sans font family used throughout; no explicit font choice or rcParams customization.
